title: Latest open artifacts (#21): Open model bonanza! Gemma 4, DeepSeek V4, Kimi K2.6, MiMo 2.5, GLM-5.1 & others. On CAISI's V4 assessment.
reason: Multiple new open models released with an accompanying assessment, providing immediate tools and data for builders.
post_text: Gemma 4, DeepSeek V4, Kimi K2.6, MiMo 2.5, and GLM-5.1 open models are now available, with CAISI's V4 assessment. Builders can evaluate these new models for deployment or fine-tuning, using the assessment to compare performance and capabilities.
source_angle: Overview of multiple new open models and their CAISI V4 assessment.
